title: Durability Display
description: Displays percentage of every item including how much use left of it. Including Elytra's, Armor, Weapons, etc. on the toolbar.
body:
## **Features:**

Displays durability percentages for _**all hotbar items**_

Shows offhand durability **(e.g., shields)**

Text is rendered on-screen, centered for visibility

Dynamic color coding (Green >60%, Yellow >30%, Red ≤30%)

Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer (client-side HUD)

Developer: Will soon pair with uku's armor HUD
